title: Default column order in dashboard widget
excerpt:
Hi, 
When I create a table widget in a dashboard, 
It seems like there is a default column order that I cannot change 
And no way to hide or sort a column as well. 
This is really annoying because dashboard is the only w…

posts.author: laurentlemerle (Lemerle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
When I create a table widget in a dashboard,
It seems like there is a default column order that I cannot change
And no way to hide or sort a column as well.
This is really annoying because dashboard is the only way to consolidate table information from different board
Regards
Laurent

posts.author: ttt (Toby Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml: I second this question/request. I need to change column order else this feature is useless to me

posts.author: gary.allen (Gary)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here. Please add this to development (i.e. Add the ability to sort columns inside widget view). The filters work well to enable the widget to display the data requested, but results appear in an unknown sequence. The ability to sort by a selected column (as you can in normal boards) would be a great help.

posts.author: graeme.renfrey (Graeme)
posts.cookedHtml: or … at least don’t change the order of columns from the original table. Why do the column orders all change when i insert the Table into a dashboard as a widget?

posts.author: Inesmhdez (Ines)
posts.cookedHtml: I would appreciate having the flexibility to organize data in a way that is logical and meaningful within my chat. For instance, it would be helpful if the data could be linked to the corresponding row, so that if I move the row, the order remains consistent in my chart and in the ‘More Options’ section with the three dots. Additionally, it would be beneficial to have the ability to organize columns by choosing the ‘Sort By’ option. Similarly, I would like the option to select custom colours for the charts from the available options. Thank you.

posts.author: dapug (David Pugmire)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is one of many, many reasons why dashboards are so completely useless.

Inability to actually arrange what is seen and how it is seen… that is certainly no dashboard. Might as well call it a “see it the way Monday decided for you” board.

Does Monday.com even have UX designers? If so, do they understand the needs of the workforce at all?

posts.author: micaylabrewster (Micayla Brewster)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve found the inability to rearrange or hide columns easily in dashboards to really hinder my workflow and would love to see this prioritized!

posts.author: Talis (Tao)
posts.cookedHtml: You can go to settings to choose which columns to show. However, there’s no way to rearrange the columns.

posts.author: 1tinyproblem (Keith Battle)
posts.cookedHtml: Hard to believe that this very fundamental feature doesn’t exist

posts.author: MaxKP (Max)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 to everyone here and especially @dapug’s more recent comment – I hope Monday teams would take care of this in the near future

posts.author: JFergus (Joseph Fergus)
posts.cookedHtml: I too find this problematic for information widgets as well. We really need to rearrange like you can in the Text Column widget.

posts.author: AliDev (Ali)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a very important feature that would help us a lot.

posts.author: MaxKP (Max)
posts.cookedHtml: No updates on this one?

posts.author: charlieg (Charlie Gilbert)
posts.cookedHtml: I wouldn’t hold your breath. Monday devs don’t focus on anything that would bring value to the average user. They only prioritize what they can monetize (see: AI, Workflows, Vibe, etc.)

posts.author: aknight (Austin Knight)
posts.cookedHtml: Not having the ability to change the order of the columns in a dashboard view is very frustrating. Monday.com is this going to be implemented? I appreciate the ability to hide columns, but not being able to change the order of the columns like I am able to in a board view makes dashboards a pretty poor tool.
